name: pilot-dotnet
description: C# / ASP.NET Core codebase governance: Clean Architecture, SOLID/DRY, coding standards, performance, caching, authentication (OIDC/external IdP, refresh-token rotation, MFA — distinct from authorization), permissions-ONLY authorization (no role checks, ever; JWT PII/permission hardening), multitenancy, soft delete, audit fields (Guid-typed), CORS, repository pattern, shared libraries, Excel/PDF document I/O (with malware-scan/signature verification), templated email service plus SMS/push notifications, Guid entity keys, API versioning, API pagination/filtering/sorting conventions, outbound webhook delivery (HMAC signing, retry, SSRF-safe callbacks), Minimal API vs Controller governance, middleware pipeline ordering, modular DI/clean Program.cs, Hangfire background jobs, scheduled reporting/ETL pipelines, DB-backed dynamic configuration, fail-fast startup configuration validation, XML+DB localization, HTTP and EF Core resilience (Polly, EnableRetryOnFailure), liveness/readiness health-check endpoints, observability (OpenTelemetry), centralized error handling (ProblemDetails), request validation, integration testing, PII data protection, optimistic concurrency, rate limiting, the transactional outbox pattern, broader Service Bus/Event Grid messaging topology, Saga orchestration/choreography for distributed transactions, gRPC service-to-service contracts, Backend-for-Frontend aggregation for the Angular client, feature flags (Microsoft.FeatureManagement), SignalR/streaming real-time patterns, compliance-grade access-audit logging, financial/currency precision, secrets rotation, consumer-driven API contract testing, database connection-pool tuning, GraphQL/HotChocolate design, chaos-engineering verification of resilience policies, DTO/entity mapping boundaries (AutoMapper/Mapster), structured logging architecture (Serilog sinks, enrichers, redaction), synchronous-API idempotency keys, CQRS/MediatR command-query separation, NuGet Central Package Management/lock-file governance, and Conventional-Commits-aligned dependency hygiene. Ships a reviewer, implementor, and support agent trio: @dotnet-reviewer finds violations, @dotnet-implementor fixes them, @dotnet-support diagnoses backend runtime issues to root cause
